recentTweets.text:
We should all be outraged that ICE killed 2 people in just a week. 

Alongside nearly 200 House Democrats, I’m calling for accountability, justice, and an independent investigation into these tragedies.
https://t.co/eF0ALdYRhS

Great discussion with @steelworkers!

Proud to work together to preserve and expand Social Security, support safe working conditions & provide resources for Veteran union members. https://t.co/GAhIS6Z2ya

Trump’s a sore loser with a fixation and a vendetta.

Tonight's pathetic rant was Trump's latest attempt to sow doubt in our elections.

Beware: it won’t stop until November.

But Republicans will lose this fall because Americans are tired of their high costs and chaos.

Trump’s Commerce Department is empowering bad actors abroad while undercutting American innovation.
 
No more ignoring the problem. In @HouseForeign, I called for Trump and his cronies to step up, support American businesses, and protect our most sensitive technologies. https://t.co/XgSvNRPSce

Even Trump’s teleprompter operator is lining his pockets. 

This is why we need my BETS OFF Act to stop insiders — like the guy who LITERALLY reads all the President's speeches in advance — from betting on outcomes they know.

Example #1,342 of Trump cashing in on the presidency.

All while gutting health care and raising costs.

Shame. Time to end Trump’s blatant corruption.

When Republicans slash public health funding and stop monitoring the spread of disease, Americans get sick.

I opposed Republicans’ disastrous State Department funding bill that would make Americans less safe and more vulnerable to outbreaks like Ebola. https://t.co/R0E6cIHmVa
https://t.co/Yqkbn3hSd6

Trump’s Big, Ugly Law is creating uncertainty & confusion for students pursuing critical health care careers.

That’s why I’m supporting @RepTimKennedy’s legislation to raise loan limits to help our future health care workforce afford educational opportunities. https://t.co/OP0lQrNCOH
RT @RhodeIslandDEM: ⚠️ Air quality is expected to reach unhealthy levels for sensitive groups statewide today (7/15) due to fine particles…

🌡️Attention RI:
A heat advisory is in effect until Wednesday evening, with high humidity and heat indexes reaching 95°-103°F.

Check in on your neighbors, keep your pets indoors, take frequent breaks if outside, and stay hydrated.

Find a cooling center near you:⤵️

RT @HouseDemocrats: Over 4 million Americans have lost food assistance because of Trump and Republicans' Big Ugly Bill.

People will go hun…

While families struggle to afford gas, groceries, and health care, Trump is spending YOUR taxpayer dollars on vanity projects.
 
Alongside @HouseBudgetDems, I’m calling for an investigation to expose every taxpayer dime going into his gilded ballroom. https://t.co/RuT87BYaN9

My thoughts are with the latest victims of Trump's ICE brutality.
 
No more condoning, enabling, and funding more tragedy.

This violence and cruelty must end.

The average American family has spent an extra $1000 because of Trump’s illegal, unnecessary war with Iran, but after nearly 140 days we still don’t have a path forward.

Joined @NewsNation to discuss why consent of Congress is critical before a President launches a war. https://t.co/5GxpD4516W

Helped kick off the Narragansett Council of Scouting America’s inaugural Roger Williams Heritage Hike! 

In celebration of our nation’s 250th anniversary, Scouts traced the historic footsteps that our state’s founder took 390 years ago. https://t.co/VVdTJpquDc

Public transportation is a lifeline, helping Rhode Islanders get to work, school, and important events.

I’m supporting @RepHankJohnson’s bipartisan Stronger Communities through Better Transit Act to invest in public transit, especially in underserved communities, and keep our https://t.co/FH2DmeLuzp

GOOD NEWS: The bipartisan housing bill is now law despite Donald Trump’s refusal to sign!🏘️

Congressional Democrats and Republicans came together to lower housing costs, cut red tape, and build more homes for Americans.

#OTD 246 years ago, French soldiers arrived in Newport to help America turn the tide of the Revolutionary War.

Proud to celebrate our nation’s oldest alliance with French Ambassador Laurent Bili, the Newport Historical Society & many others at General Rochambeau’s landing point. https://t.co/VTNOS3R4Cn

Trump is doing everything in his power to undercut, undermine, and sow doubt in our elections. 

This is a desperate power grab and distracts from all he’s done to make life more expensive.

It’s been just over a year since Trump signed his Big, Ugly Law which:

🏥Hurt community health centers
🩺Put millions of Americans at risk of losing their health care

We’ll keep pushing to stop the care cuts, make billionaires pay their fair share, and keep Americans healthy. https://t.co/jA44FEaZpn

Happy 46th Birthday to Rhode Island’s favorite Big Blue Bug!

Make sure to wish the iconic Nibbles Woodaway a very special day if you pass him on I-95. https://t.co/Cuo7yTqS3R

Thrilled to break ground on the new Public Safety Complex in North Smithfield! 

I'm proud to have brought home $500,000 in federal funding for the facility’s new communication system.

Together we're improving public infrastructure and public safety. 🤝 https://t.co/zUzo8Xjdvo

Trump can’t stop the war HE started, and Americans are paying the price. 

That’s why Congress passed a War Powers Resolution to make it clear: this war of choice needs to stop.

Joined @CNN to call for a real commitment to diplomacy, not one where we’re just dropping bombs. https://t.co/NtMsifD6TX

☀️There’s nothing better than a Rhode Island summer!🏖️

Follow these tips to have fun and stay safe this summer: https://t.co/CcCWJ9sydf

Welcomed the Veteran-founded Rise8 team to their new Providence office!

This new training center will bring more software jobs to Rhode Island, support our service members and veterans, while shaping the next generation of American innovation. https://t.co/ocZkdOQZwn

No matter what Trump says, Greenland is not up for grabs.

That’s why I introduced the NO NATO for Purchase Act to stop Trump from using your taxpayer dollars for his dreams of conquest.
https://t.co/vNTUKtXpSW

Trump’s tariff madness is devastating domestic manufacturing – the exact opposite of the ‘golden age’ he promised.

Small businesses are squeezed, costs are rising, and Americans pay the price.

You deserve better.
Policies show priorities. The Big, Ugly Law makes Americans poorer, sicker, and hungrier. Trump's priority is catering to the billionaire class — at the expense of working people. 5/5

This cruelty lets rogue masked men rampage through our communities.

His Big, Ugly Law poured $170 billion into a slush fund for ICE and CBP – whose agents killed two Americans exercising their First Amendment rights. 🧵4/5

Just a year ago, Trump signed his Big, Ugly Law, making it harder for millions of Americans to eat, stay healthy, and go to school.

Here's a breakdown of how it's hurting you ⤵️  🧵 1/5

LET'S GO #TeamUSA!

We’re cheering you on from Rhode Island! 🇺🇸🦅⚽️
RT @NWSBoston: [Flash Flood Risk Probability] This graphic indicates the probability for localized flash flooding across southern New Engla…

Big thank you to Team Amo interns in Rhode Island and D.C. for their hard work this summer!

Interested in public service? Apply for an internship to gain hands-on experience serving the people of #RI01.

📅Fall internship applications close on July 17th at 5:00 PM. https://t.co/uGufgiYrWD

No better day to view Rhode Island’s three copies of the Declaration of Independence than America’s 250th anniversary!

Took the opportunity to reflect upon the world-changing words of our Founders and recommit to the values of our aspirational nation!🇺🇸 https://t.co/eAkcVN0Y2x

Bristol in #RI01 is home to the longest continuously observed Fourth of July celebration in the country!🇺🇸🎆

On our 250th anniversary, proud to celebrate where Rhode Islanders & visitors from all over have come together since 1785 to patriotically commemorate our independence! https://t.co/eLZ92jI2te

Happy Fourth of July, Rhode Island!🇺🇸

As we celebrate our freedom with fireworks, food, family, and friends, take a moment to mark our progress and recommit to the work of the next 250 years. https://t.co/Zp8Lff3ojZ

Good luck to the #BlackStars in their knockout round tonight!⚽

Ghana has called Rhode Island home this #WorldCup— where we’ve got many proud Colombian-Americans, too!

Regardless of the outcome, proud to represent such strong Ghanaian and Colombian communities.🇬🇭🏟️🇨🇴
Across Rhode Island, joining the Cape Verdean-American community in cheering on the Blue Sharks as they continue their dream run in the #WorldCup!🇨🇻🦈⚽️

🎆If you’re celebrating with fireworks this Fourth of July, follow local guidelines, keep water on hand, and dispose of them responsibly!

Remember! High temps and little rain can lead to brush fires!

Stay safe and have fun!
https://t.co/uniWRwlMSd

Proud to lead legislation with @SenWhitehouse to secure a Congressional Gold Medal for the heroism of our new country’s first integrated military unit, the First Rhode Island Regiment — a truly American story in the fight for freedom.

Broken promises. That’s the headline for the Trump Administration.

He’s running a money making operation out of the White House rather than enhancing the lives of the Americans.

Joined @alivitali on @MSNOWNews to discuss how the chaos and corruption has got to stop. https://t.co/ll5is9FPnF

Thank you to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their generous support of the @RIFoodBank and charity organizations across the country.

Wishing Taylor (and Travis of course) the wedding of their ~wildest dreams~, even if it’s not in the Ocean State.

☀️ @RohdeD 
🌡️ @moses_small 
☕️ @RepGabeAmo 
🌞 @MarkBednar

Working families are living paycheck to paycheck, so no, everybody is not profiting.
https://t.co/5lQVts1p23

📣 MAJOR CHANGES TO STUDENT LOANS STARTING TODAY:
 
💵Fewer loan options
💵SAVE plan for current borrowers scrapped 
💵Lower borrowing limits
 
Find out how you're impacted: https://t.co/YFKdVviVSt

High costs are keeping families from getting ahead, so we should have policies that respond to this crisis.

I’m supporting Congresswoman @rosadelauro’s American Family Act to expand the Child Tax Credit and make sure every child has the opportunity to fulfill their potential. https://t.co/nHW2gtOM8I

For 241 years, Bristol, Rhode Island has been home to our nation’s longest continuously running Fourth of July commemoration.

This celebration of our values exemplifies what I’m fighting for in Congress – an America where opportunity, freedom, and justice prevails! https://t.co/8tNVCb48Nf

Calling all RI religious organizations and nonprofits:

Sign up for @RhodeIslandEMA’s info session to learn about applying for the Nonprofit Security Grant Program.

I’m proud to lead efforts in Congress to secure funding for this essential program and keep Rhode Islanders safe.

🚨ATTENTION RI:

An extreme heat warning will go into effect from 10AM Wednesday to 8PM Saturday with heat indexes possibly reaching over 100°.

Remember to:
💧Stay hydrated
☀️Avoid direct sun
👋🏿Check on your neighbors

🏘️Find cooling centers near you here:https://t.co/ezpjtagZFo https://t.co/xM2sNnkpEg

Thank you to all the Rhode Islanders who joined my telephone town hall last night! 

Our conversation will inform my work in Congress as I keep fighting to lower costs and build opportunity for every Rhode Island family. https://t.co/nC8FXJzj6F

If you are born in the United States of America, you are a citizen.

Today’s decision reaffirms longstanding precedent of what it means to be an American, but this should never have been in question.

Read my full statement on the SCOTUS birthright citizenship decision here ⤵️ https://t.co/YfgysZHz1J

My thoughts are with the loved ones of the three individuals who lost their lives in the vehicle in the Seekonk River. 

Thank you to all of the first responders involved for their search and recovery efforts.
https://t.co/p35UvutJFr

Whether you’re walking, biking, or driving, our community will benefit from investments in roadway safety.🚶🚲🚙 https://t.co/aqlPpcvvYL

🗣️ATTENTION #RI01

I will be hosting a telephone town hall TOMORROW, Monday, June 29, at 7:00 PM!

Join us to learn more about how I’m fighting for Rhode Islanders in Congress. 

RSVP at link: https://t.co/sNbNyX1NMz https://t.co/wBLCnrGbhJ

This Immigrant Heritage Month, I want to take a moment to recognize the generations of immigrants who have made Rhode Island great.

They have shaped our nation’s character and contributed to our success.

Our diversity is what makes us stronger.

I do care that he's slashed funding for Rhode Island energy projects. 

And I'm going to keep pushing to reverse his politically-motivated cuts. 👀👀👀 https://t.co/4Wcc9rB8bW

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for Gabe Amo. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
